---
title: Summary
---


| Part | Topic | Duration |
|------|-------|----------|
| 1 | AI & Machine Learning Foundations | 30 min |
| 2 | Supervised Learning — Prediction (Regression) | 30 min |
|  | *Break* | *10 min* |
| 3 | Supervised Learning — Classification | 40 min |
|  | *Break* | *10 min* |
| 4 | Large Language Models | 30 min |
